home.label: Home
home.description: The main entry point to your site, highlighting key offerings and the core value proposition.

landing.label: Landing
landing.description: A focused, campaign-driven page tailored to capture leads or spotlight a specific feature.

product.label: Product
product.description: Explains key features, benefits, and use cases of your SaaS product.

blog.label: Blog
blog.description: A collection of articles, updates, and thought leadership related to your product or industry.

testimonial.label: Testimonial
testimonial.description: Showcases quotes, case studies, or endorsements from satisfied clients.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.description: Addresses common user questions to reduce friction and provide quick clarity.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.description: Outlines subscription tiers, costs, and plan benefits for prospective customers.

releasenote.label: Release Note
releasenote.description: Details recent product updates, bug fixes, and new functionalities.

contact.label: Contact
contact.description: Offers support and inquiry channels (email, phone, forms) for questions or assistance.

about.label: About
about.description: Presents your company's story, mission, team background, and core values.

document.label: Document
document.description: Provides technical instructions, integration guides, or user manuals.

legal.label: Legal
legal.description: Hosts important policies such as Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and compliance statements.

general.label: General
general.description: A catch-all category for pages that do not fall under any of the above specific types.
